about.label: About PlagaiScans
about.title: Document Analysis Platform for
about.paragraph1: PlagaiScans is a document analysis platform that compares submitted text against indexed sources to generate similarity indicators.
about.paragraph2: Reports are provided for informational purposes only and should be used as a reference tool alongside human review.
about.feature1Desc: View matched text segments and source references for your review.
about.feature2Desc: Reports include references to matched sources where available.
about.feature3Desc: Advisory indicators to support your content review process.
about.feature4Desc: Documents are processed securely. Users may delete their documents after processing.

howItWorks.title: How
howItWorks.subtitle: A simple process for document analysis and content review.
howItWorks.ctaDescription: Create an account to access our document analysis tools.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Sign up and upload your document in a supported format (PDF, DOC, DOCX, TXT).
howItWorks.step2Desc: Your text is compared against available indexed sources to identify potential overlaps.
howItWorks.step3Desc: A report is generated showing similarity indicators and matched text segments.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Download and manually review the findings. Interpretation is your responsibility.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about our document analysis service.
faq.supportTeamReady: Our support team is available to help with additional inquiries.
faq.q1: What is a full Turnitin report?
faq.a1: A full Turnitin report includes the complete similarity analysis and AI detection breakdown — the same document your institution receives, with source links and sentence-level highlighting.
faq.q2: How accurate is the Turnitin report?
faq.a2: The report uses Turnitin's own detection engine, so the percentages and matched sources are identical to what your professor would see when running the same paper.
faq.q3: How much does a full Turnitin report cost?
faq.a3: Just $3.99 per report. There are no subscriptions, no recurring charges, and credits never expire.
faq.q4: How long does it take to get my report?
faq.a4: Most reports are delivered in 2–5 minutes. Larger or more complex documents may take a little longer during peak hours.
faq.q5: Will my paper be stored or shared?
faq.a5: No. We use a no-repository submission method, so your paper is never added to the Turnitin student database and cannot be flagged later by your school.
faq.q6: Can I still use the free AI detector?
faq.a6: Yes. Our standalone AI detector remains available for quick checks. The paid Turnitin report adds full similarity matching and the official report PDF.
faq.q7: What if I'm not satisfied with my report?
faq.a7: If a technical issue prevents your report from being generated, contact support and we'll re-run the scan or refund the credit used.
faq.a8: No. PlagaiScans is an independent service and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Turnitin LLC. All trademarks belong to their respective owners.
